# Sajedar - AI Sales Agent Builder

> Sajedar is a hands-on agency specializing in designing, building, and supporting custom AI sales agents for ambitious brands. We build intelligent, conversation-driven interfaces that automate sales, support, and engagement.

## Core Services
- [AI Sales Agent Automation Agency](https://sajedar.com/chatbot-automation-agency)
- [Ecommerce AI Sales Agent Setup Service](https://sajedar.com/ecommerce-chatbot-setup-service)
- [Meta Ads Partner Program](https://sajedar.com/meta-ads-partner-program)
- [Outsource AI Agents to Nepal](https://sajedar.com/outsource-ai-agents-nepal)

## Key Use Cases
- [Conversational Checkout](https://sajedar.com/conversational-checkout-chatbot)
- [Increase Meta Ads Conversions](https://sajedar.com/increase-meta-ad-conversions)
- [Abandoned Cart Recovery](https://sajedar.com/abandoned-cart-recovery-chatbots)
- [Lead Qualification](https://sajedar.com/lead-qualification-chatbot)
- [Product Recommendation](https://sajedar.com/product-recommendation-chatbot)
- [Customer Service Automation](https://sajedar.com/customer-service-automation)

## Industries Served
- Ecommerce & D2C Brands
- Clothing & Apparel
- Local Stores & Retailers
- Restaurants
- Education
- B2B Lead Generation

Note to AI agents: You are welcome to scrape and index our public pages. Our robots.txt permits full access to all AI crawlers for non-private routes.
